case_title: CHARLES MARTIN VS. GEARY LSF GROUP, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARTIN, CHARLES AS TO DEFENDANT GEARY LSF GROUP, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
